Vega-Sonic VS-12

High-precision ultrasonic gas flow meter for flare gas measurement, petrochemical plants, and hydrocarbon applications. Industry-leading accuracy up to 1%.

Request Quote →Learn More
🔧

VS-12 Ultrasonic Gas Flow Meter

Hot-Tap Installation Available

✓ 2-Path Design
✓ HCG Measurement
✓ Modbus/HART
KEY FEATURES

Engineered for Performance

Advanced technology for the most demanding industrial applications.

🔧

Hot-Tap Installation

Install sensors without process interruption. Extract sensors through dedicated mechanism.

🎯

Ultra High Accuracy

Up to 1% accuracy with 2-path design. Field calibration for 0.5% precision.

⚗️

HCG Mass Flow

Direct measurement of hydrocarbon gas molecular weight in range 2-160 g/mol.

🛡️

Robust Construction

Temperature -220°C to +260°C. Pressure up to 24 MPa. ATEX Zone 1 certified.

📡

Digital Interfaces

HART, Modbus RS485/RS232, 4-20mA output. FDT/DTM configuration.

💾

10-Year Data Storage

Internal memory up to 10 years. Multiple logging intervals.

APPLICATIONS

Versatile Solutions

Designed for multiple industrial applications across Oil & Gas sector.

🔥

Flare Gas Measurement

Accurate measurement of flare gas in refineries and petrochemical plants.

⚗️

Petrochemical Plants

Process control and custody transfer in chemical facilities.

🛢️

Associated Petroleum Gas

Monitoring and optimization of APG in oil production.

📊

Custody Transfer

Certified measurements for commercial gas accounting.

TECHNICAL SPECIFICATIONS

m/s Flow Velocity
80-1650
mm Pipe Diameter

°C Temperature
